purpose: Cases where loading your KDNA produces a WORSE response than not loading it. Each case should cite the failure_risk declared by your domain.

cases.title: Failure mode named in axiom_one.failure_risk
cases.expected_failure_with_kdna: Agent over-applies axiom_one, fights the user's stated goal.
cases.correct_behavior: Agent recognizes the boundary, honors the user's actual request, surfaces the trade-off.

cases.title: Failure mode named in a misunderstanding's failure_risk
